summary: Dynatrace and APM observability consultant with deep experience supporting enterprise monitoring platforms, telemetry pipelines, dashboards, alerts, thresholds, and operational reporting. Experienced with Dynatrace AppMon, Synthetic Monitoring, EUM/RUM, transaction tracing, CA APM, BMC TrueSight, and AppDynamics across large-scale environments. Strong background in operationalizing monitoring processes, creating runbooks and documentation, coordinating across application and infrastructure teams, and using Python and shell scripting to reduce manual effort.

experience.title: Senior Observability & Capacity Engineering Lead
bullets: Built and maintained telemetry ingestion and reporting pipelines using Python/Pandas across 6,000+ monitored endpoints, improving operational visibility and reporting reliability.
Integrated monitoring feeds from BMC TrueSight/TSCO, CA Wily, and AppDynamics into unified reporting layers used for capacity, performance, and operational analysis.
Developed dashboards, reporting workflows, and threshold-driven analysis to support incident readiness, infrastructure visibility, and executive-level decision-making.
Partnered with infrastructure, application, and operations teams to improve monitoring adoption, reporting consistency, and sustainable operational processes.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for critical hospitality systems and Brand.com, supporting production performance visibility and issue detection.
Implemented end-user monitoring and transaction tracing across web and mobile platforms to improve application observability and operational insight.
Led Dynatrace 6.5 to 7.0 upgrade with TLS 1.2 enforcement and zero production regression during the monitoring platform cutover.
Led the FAST initiative, data-mining real-user performance metrics from Gomez Synthetic Monitoring to identify optimization opportunities adopted by engineering teams.

experience.title: SME for CA APM
bullets: Managed enterprise CA APM environments supporting 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents across distributed application environments.
Led large-scale CA APM upgrade initiatives from 9.1 to 10.1 with zero unplanned downtime while coordinating cross-functional IT teams.
Designed custom dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and Management Modules that became monitoring standards across client environments.
Built Perl/Korn Shell automation scripts for recurring telemetry extraction, operational reporting, and performance data workflows.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Observability & APM: Dynatrace AppMon, Dynatrace Synthetics, EUM/RUM, Transaction Tracing, CA APM / Introscope, BMC TrueSight / TSCO, AppDynamics
skills.Monitoring Operations: Monitoring Operationalization, Dashboarding, Alerts, Thresholds, Runbooks, Documentation, Performance Analysis, Incident Readiness
skills.Automation & Scripting: Python, SQL, Perl, Ksh / Korn Shell Scripting
skills.Data & Telemetry: Telemetry Pipelines, Operational Reporting, ETL Automation, Data Warehousing, PySpark
skills.Legacy / Enterprise: C++, Java, PL/SQL, Oracle RAC, WebLogic / WebSphere

projects.name: FAST Project
projects.description: Led a telemetry analysis and monitoring optimization initiative using Dynatrace and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring data to identify performance improvement opportunities for critical production systems.

projects.name: HorizonScale — Capacity & Telemetry Analytics Platform
projects.description: Developed telemetry analytics workflows and dashboards supporting infrastructure visibility, forecasting, operational reporting, and capacity analysis across large-scale monitored environments.
